channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: After 2 years in an Argentine prison, former Masters champ Angel Cabrera is back at Augusta National
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — It has been six long years since Angel Cabrera walked the verdant green fairways of the Masters. Two were spent in a gray Argentine prison cell. Once feted with a parade through the streets of Cordoba for his U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hurricane Helene hit Augusta National last summer. What it left is noticeable, not necessarily bad
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The patrons walking up the first fairway at Augusta National during a sun-splashed practice round for the Masters managed to find a nice viewpoint between a couple of pines, where they watched as Justin Rose hit an approach shot to the green.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin admits he had doubts about reaching Wayne Gretzky record
item.description: Washington Capitals star Alex Ovechkin appeared on Fox News Channel's "Fox & Friends" on Wednesday to talk his record-setting achievement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canucks shock Stars with 3 goals in final minute, OT win
item.description: The Vancouver Canucks became the first team to score three goals in the final minute of regulation as they stunned the Dallas Stars on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Timberwolves watch their playoff position tumble after blowing huge lead in 4th quarter
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Regular-season defeats don’t get much more brutal than the one the Minnesota Timberwolves suffered Tuesday. The wide-open nature of the Western Conference playoff race doesn’t give them much time to stew over what went wrong.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: With top seed in East secured, Atkinson wants to get some of Cavaliers' top players some rest
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kenny Atkinson thought during training camp that realistic goals for the Cleveland Cavaliers would be 50 wins and a top-three seed in the Eastern Conference. The Cavaliers surpassed those goals awhile ago to the point where Atkinson is planning for a possible championship run.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jaylon Johnson wants to see real accountability before he says the Bears have changed for the better
item.description: Jaylon Johnson is heading into his sixth NFL season and third go-around riding Chicago's head coaching carousel, and is excited to see the positive change that has eluded them since he joined the franchise, and is looking forward to the Bears' fresh start with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NHL first-round pick retires at age 21 due to tissue disorder diagnosis
item.description: Chaz Lucius, the 18th overall selection of the 2021 NHL Draft, was forced to retire at the age of 21 due to a tissue disorder diagnosis.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Grizzlies' Jaylen Wells breaks his wrist on hard landing that sent rookie to the hospital
item.description: Memphis starting guard Jaylen Wells broke his right wrist on a hard fall on his arm and head from a midair collision at the end of a fast-break dunk during a victory over Charlotte.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Octavio Dotel, who once held record of pitching for 13 major league teams, dies in DR roof collapse
item.description: SANTO DOMINGO, Dominican Republic (AP) — Octavio Dotel, who pitched for 13 major league teams in a 15-year career and won a World Series with the St. Louis Cardinals, was among the dead after a roof collapsed at a nightclub in his native Dominican Republic where he was attending a merengue concert.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy, still vying for first Masters title, wants to 'block out the noise' at Augusta
item.description: Rory McIlroy knows the conversation surrounding him as he heads into his 17th Masters Tournament, but the 35-year-old is "trying to block out the noise.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kane misses, Frattesi scores as Inter beats Bayern 2-1 in 1st leg of Champions League quarterfinals
item.description: MUNICH (AP) — Inter Milan’s treble chances are still very much on after it won 2-1 at Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals Tuesday to inflict the German team's first home defeat in the competition in almost exactly four years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-MLB players Octavio Dotel, Tony Blanco among dead in Dominican Republic roof collapse
item.description: Octavio Dotel and Tony Blanco were among the former MLB players who were killed in the Dominican Republic roof collapse on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Cody Bellinger misses Tigers game possibly due to food poisoning, manager says
item.description: New York Yankees outfielder Cody Bellinger was held out the starting lineup possibly due to food poisoning after he ate a bad batch of chicken wings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kris Jenkins, the Villanova hero in 2016 national title game, sues NCAA for money he could have made
item.description: Kris Jenkins, who made the winning shot for Villanova in the 2016 college basketball championship game, is suing the NCAA and six conferences to recoup income he contends he would have earned if athletes at the time were not barred from making money from their name, image and likeness.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Granite Hills 4, San Marcos 4
item.description: SAN MARCOS(KUSI)- Spring break baseball at the yard on Tuesday afternoon in the North County with this one ending in a 4-4 tie.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson Merrill, Padres agree to $135 million, 9-year contract
item.description: All-Star outfielder Jackson Merrill started paying immediate dividends on the $135 million, nine-year contract he and the San Diego Padres agreed to on Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC signs Escondido native Milan Iloski from FC Nordsjaelland
item.description: San Diego FC has acquired forward Milan Iloski on loan from its sister club, FC Nordsjaelland (FCN), the club announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
